calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Continued To Nov-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761

Eric Shiu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Salesforce.com Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Paul Guernsey was placed under oath and testified.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Debt Point.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages $106,513.39
Prejudgment Interest $22,315.29
Attorney Fees $1,000.00
Costs $695.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $130,523.68
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Ntc Of Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Continued To Oct-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Continued To Oct-03-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
